violations.text: The ceiling in the front food prep/warewashing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The ceiling tiles in the front prep/wareashing area is in poor repair (water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (on the counter) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quatenary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The following was observed: 1) The ceiling tiles were observed with water damage 2) The walls behind the 3-bay sink observed to be chipping New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2024

The ceiling above the food prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The walls behind the 3-bay sink are constructed of sheets that have exposed wood-like material. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2024
